description: VN-first output + locale ≠ market. VN-market copy must be Vietnamese (diacritics present); a VN-approved claim must NOT clear a TH publish (per-locale approval).

cases.why: Vietnamese-first copy for a VN piece
English copy for a VN piece is not VN-first
CLM-008 is VN-approved only — must fail a TH publish (locale ≠ market)
